attributes.name: Strength
attributes.description: Increases physical attack damage. Warriors and Barbarians benefit most.

attributes.name: Intellect
attributes.description: Increases magical damage and max mana pool. Essential for Mage Priests.

attributes.name: Vitality
attributes.description: Increases maximum HP. Important for all frontline fighters.

attributes.name: Dexterity
attributes.description: Increases critical hit chance and ranged damage. Key stat for Rangers.

attributes.name: Endurance
attributes.description: Increases physical defense and max stamina. Dwarves excel here.

attributes.name: Wisdom
attributes.description: Increases magical defense, heal power, and mana regeneration.

attributes.name: Agility
attributes.description: Increases evasion chance and turn speed. Determines action order.

attributes.name: Tactics
attributes.description: Increases buff/debuff effectiveness and ability damage modifiers.
